headline: Enforcing Rigorous Logic on Claude Code Workflows
lede: We are moving past prompt engineering into the realm of strict behavioral architectural constraints. By injecting principle-based configuration files, this framework compels AI agents to verify assumptions before committing code, effectively eliminating the silent failures that plague modern LLM development.

headline: Building High-Performance 3D Architectural Editors in Browser
lede: Rendering complex spatial scenes requires a sophisticated handoff between state management and WebGPU acceleration. This monorepo provides a clean, modular structure for building digital twins, turning the browser into a professional-grade geometric modeling environment.

headline: Persistent Long-Term Memory for AI Coding Sessions
lede: Context loss remains the primary friction point in generative programming. By merging SQLite relational storage with Chroma vector search, this plugin creates a fluid retrieval stream that allows your coding agent to maintain deep continuity across long-term development lifecycles.

headline: A Comprehensive Scholarly Curriculum for LLM Development
lede: Mastery of Large Language Models requires navigating the intersection of mathematical reasoning and practical security implementation. This academic repository serves as an essential, peer-vetted resource for bridging the gap between theoretical research and full-stack model deployment.

headline: Simulating Algorithmic Markets with Autonomous Investor Agents
lede: What happens when you let autonomous agents debate market sentiment? This project offers a raw, hands-on look at multi-agent workflows applied to finance, providing a sandbox for testing how LLM-synthesized perspectives behave under simulated investment pressure.

headline: Archiving the Apollo Guidance Computer Source Code
lede: We honor the foundational logic that guided humanity to the lunar surface. This repository preserves the original assembly language of the Apollo Guidance Computer, ensuring the meticulous engineering of the 1960s remains readable for future generations of software historians.

headline: Standardizing Automated Engineering Lifecycles with Superpowers
lede: Moving from ad-hoc prompting to reliable software delivery requires an enforced engineering cadence. This framework integrates Socratic planning and strict test-driven development to ensure that AI agents behave like disciplined professional engineers rather than probabilistic generators.

headline: Self-Hosted Voice Synthesis for Private Media Production
lede: Cloud-based AI audio shouldn't be the only option for content creators who value their privacy. This Tauri-powered studio allows you to perform local, high-performance voice cloning and multi-track editing, keeping your creative data off external servers.

headline: A Curated Index of Public Web APIs
lede: Building software today relies on the reliable integration of third-party data services. This manual directory maps out the landscape of available APIs, providing a structured blueprint for rapid prototyping and external data consumption across all major domains.

headline: Deploying Durable, Autonomous Coding Agents on Vercel
lede: Reliable agents require an architecture that survives the transient nature of serverless execution. By decoupling the interface from a persistent, sandboxed runner, this template provides a scalable and professional foundation for long-running autonomous development tasks.
